name: python3-google-api-core
title: python3-google-api-core
description:
Google API client core library
Core Library for Google Client Libraries
This library is not meant to stand-alone. Instead it defines
common helpers used by all Google API clients.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-google-api-core because Google API client core library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-google-api-core as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-google-api-core with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-google-api-core --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
